title: nephelium melanomiscum
intro: Nephelium melanomiscum, also known as the black buffalo nut, is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where the fruit and seeds are used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Nephelium melanomiscum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the fruit and seeds are often used in decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, and are also used in traditional medicine as a poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
